title: Jerk Tagine Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the bold flavors of the Caribbean with the rich tradition of North African cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add onion, garlic, and ginger, and cook until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add jerk seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add cinnamon sticks, if using, and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 400°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in preserved lemon and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
